title: cyperus thorelii
intro: Cyperus thorelii, also known as the Thore's umbrella sedge or umbrella sedge, is a plant species in the sedge family (Cyperaceae). It is native to Southeast Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are used to treat various ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
